questions.text: An [mm] PR with a proposed mental-model update was opened for this PR — review and decide on it (merge or close), then comment /mm-answer mm-pr: <decided> to continue.

rationale: PR #7 changes the mental model because client failover can now be triggered by per-client URMA data-plane success-rate windows, not only worker liveness; the diff adds URMA_DATA_PLANE_FAILURE, UrmaSuccessRateTracker, hot-updatable failover gflags, and async switch submission that keeps the current worker usable via TCP fallback.
